spectral_tuning.action: Applying +15dB gain with extreme Q (Q > 15.0) at specific harmonic nodes
spectral_tuning.target: Harmonic series of the root note (f, 2f, 3f, 4f...)
spectral_tuning.modulation: Automated frequency sweep (Phaser-style) but with precise 'notches'
spectral_tuning.result: Whistling, singing artifacts that dance above the mix
